name: chr19_19q13_33_TGFB1_SD
description: 19q13.2-q13.33 SD field including TGFB1, BCL3 and the CD22/RELB neighbourhood. Embedded between the 19q13.31 ZNF mega-cluster and the 19q13.33 ZNF tail; short flanking SDs at 90-96% identity contribute to mapping ambiguity around clinically important immune genes.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 5-30 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 90-96% identity flanking TGFB1, BCL3, RELB; partial inter-chromosomal duplicons to TGFB family loci on chr1 and chr14.
